title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 44.035 - Persons with health-related ailments, voluntary county registry for disasters or emergencies
text:
44.035.  Persons with health-related ailments, voluntary county registry for disasters or emergencies. — Any county may create a voluntary registry of persons with health-related ailments to assist individuals in case of a disaster or emergency.  No name, address, or any other personal identifying information used in such a voluntary registry shall be deemed a public record under chapter 610.  If a disaster or emergency occurs that involves any person listed on the registry, an incident report as defined in section*610.100 shall be made public.
(L. 2014 H.B. 1426 merged with S.B. 767) 
*Word "chapter" appears here in H.B. 1426, 2014.
